Two-day seminars listing

April 1996
Journalism & NewsroomData & DatabasesInvestigative Methods

Two-day journalism seminars offering panel discussions and hands-on training in spreadsheet and database skills are being held at seven locations across the United States in May and June, with registration costs ranging from $50-$135.

The following two-day seminars, including one day of panel discussions and demonstrations and one day of hands-on training in basic spreadsheet and database skills, are open to all journalists. Cost ranges from $50-$75 for Day I and from $100-$135 for both days. Here is a list of dates, locations and phone numbers to call for more information: East Lansing, Mich., May 14-15, (313) 259-0650. Concord, N.H., May 14-15, (603) 224-3327.

Aberdeen, S.D., May 17-18, (605) 332-2111 Albany, N.Y., May 20-21, (518) 458-7821 Rochester, N.Y., May 22-23, (518) 458-7821 Vancouver, Wash., May 31-June I, (206) 682-1812 State College, Penn., June 7-8, (215) 561-1133
